basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Project Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: 4-year undergraduate degree and 2 years of relevant experience, Any non-engineering degree and 5 years of relevant experience
qualification.details: Project Manager: 4-year undergraduate degree and 2 years of relevant experience OR Any non-engineering degree and 5 years of relevant experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Project Manager Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Madras Project Manager Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Madras Project Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the IIT Madras Project Manager recruitment is 29 June 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Project Manager post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Manager post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 100000 per month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Manager position?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Project Manager post, candidates must possess a 4-year undergraduate degree with 2 years of relevant experience, or any non-engineering degree with 5 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, according to the official notification, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Project Manager role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Manager role at IIT Madras typically involves shortlisting of applications, followed by a test or interview, and finally document verification.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the IIT Madras Project Manager vacancy?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official website of IIT Madras or via the direct application link provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Project Manager position at IIT Madras is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Project Manager post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Manager post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Madras located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Madras is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 600036.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment of Project Manager at IIT Madras is ICSR/PR/Advt.113/2026.
